Generate 3 proficiency levels for each of the following skills. Use these level names: Level 1 = Foundational, Level 2 = Competent, Level 3 = Expert. Each level_description should be 2-3 sentences in enterprise HR language, behaviorally anchored, and clearly differentiated from adjacent levels.\n\nCall add_proficiency_levels with the following
